name: Skull Satamon

signature_move.name: Nail Bone
signature_move.description: Fires a powerful light from the jewel at the end of its staff to disrupt and obliterate the opponent's data.

description: The ruined, remnant form of what was once a Fallen Angel Digimon that fell into the Dark Area , pursuing strength and destruction. However, its wickedness was refined even more, so that its dark powers are unfathomable. Its Digicore , concentrated with mighty powers of darkness, is the characteristic of Demon-species Digimon called the "Darkcore". Its Special Move " Nail Bone " is a terrifying technique which fires a powerful light from the jewel at the end of its staff, which disrupts and obliterates the opponent's data.
